Geometric Bang.additionalHistoryText: Web research (verify): Mattia Botta (Geometric Bang), b. 1984 Lodi, based Florence; graffiti roots late 1990s. Abstract-geometric explosion style with characters and bold color; murals, illustration, music/performance. Varsi / Artribune / Italian gallery texts cite international shows since 2006 and recent walls in Rome, Genoa, Tokyo (verify titles).

2024 — Wall projects documented, Rome, Genoa, and Tokyo, Japan (verify solo vs festival context)

Laura Fridman.additionalHistoryText: Web research (verify): French artist based Tel Aviv; Yale economics background; former professional ballet (Israel Ballet). Figurative painting with dance-informed bodies; residencies Berlin and Lisbon cited on site; fairs Art3f Monaco/Zurich (verify years).
Laura Fridman.exhibitionsText:
2024 — Solo, Elegance Intemporelle, Paris, France
2022 — Solo, A Musical Touch, Tel Aviv, Israel

Keya Tama.additionalHistoryText: Web research (verify): South African–born artist, NYC-based (ages/places per interviews). Parents Faith XLVII and Tyler B. Murphy; early mural travel; assisted Shepard Fairey in LA. Mediums include mural, canvas, ceramics, tapestry (keyatama.com). Hashimoto Contemporary CV PDF lists shows—prefer that document for exact dates.
Keya Tama.exhibitionsText:
2026 — Solo / installation, Tied by Time, The Tampa EDITION rooftop, Tampa, USA
2023 — Solo, Sweet To Remember, Hashimoto Contemporary, New York, USA
2022 — Solo, Just outside your center, Subliminal Projects, Los Angeles, USA

Iain Macarthur.additionalHistoryText: Web research (verify): b. 1986 Swindon; HND Illustration Swindon College 2008; freelance London since 2009. JSR representation. Surreal patterned portraiture; clients include Nike, HBO, Wired, Pepsi, and others (LinkedIn/Behance—verify).
Iain Macarthur.exhibitionsText: 2008 — Degree show, illustration/graphic design, Swindon College, Swindon, UK

Thibaud Herem.additionalHistoryText: Web research (verify): French illustrator; architectural drawing in pencil and ink; lived/worked London, NYC, Tokyo, Seoul. Clients include Hermès, Four Seasons, Nike, Samsung, Hyundai; Netflix Our Beloved Summer artwork (2021). Books with Nobrow, Cicada, Laurence King. Handsome Frank rep; WWF Korea/Asia noted on about page (verify).
Thibaud Herem.exhibitionsText: 2022 — Solo, Jardin Fantôme, Albus Gallery, Seoul, South Korea

Frederique Mati.additionalHistoryText: Web research (verify): Frederique Matti (site spelling), Amsterdam-based art director, illustrator, painter ~10+ years freelance. Prior tech-industry design; shift toward oil painting ~2020. Clients cited include Google, Uber, Spotify, GitHub, Dropbox, and others (verify). Group shows London/Glasgow; solo in Amsterdam per portfolio interviews.
